approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 includes recognised assets and liabilities as possible hedged items, which makes the fair value hedge model a relevant top-level hedge-accounting approach for a recognised FX receivable.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 includes forecast transactions as possible hedged items and specifically addresses when foreign currency risk on intragroup forecast transactions can qualify in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify a distinct hedge-accounting model for foreign currency risk on a net investment in a foreign operation, which is a peer top-level hedge model within the FX hedging framework.
